metadata.notes: agy has plan mode (PLAN_MODE_ON/OFF in binary), but a plan-approval pause is an in-progress state never persisted to the transcript (all lines status:DONE) and the adapter has no waiting/ExitPlanMode signal. daemon=incapable → frozen.

assessment.body:
## Verdict

agent_supports: partial
daemon_capability: incapable
driver_capability: ready (n/a — frozen)

Route: frozen (the plan-approval `waiting` episode is not observable for antigravity).

## What the scenario pins

`ready → working → waiting`; state never entered `ready` between the plan emission and the user reply; after approval `waiting → working → ready`. Final state: `waiting`; the `waiting` episode is user-visible.

## agent_supports: partial

The agy binary ships plan mode (binary strings: `PLAN_MODE_ON`, `PLAN_MODE_OFF`, `PLAN_MODE_UNSPECIFIED`, `CASCADE_NUX_LOCATION_PLAN_MODE`), so the agent CAN enter plan mode and pause for approval. `partial` because the approval pause is a transient UI/IPC state, not a durable observable surface.

## daemon_capability: incapable

Same structural limit as user-blocking-question. The Antigravity adapter is transcript-first and the parser has NO waiting / ExitPlanMode / plan-approval signal — there is no emission path that yields `waiting`. And the pause itself is never persisted: every line in BOTH transcript.jsonl and transcript_full.jsonl is status:"DONE" (verified across all real conversations); a plan awaiting approval is an in-progress (non-DONE) state appended only once resolved. No `PLAN_MODE` / approval marker appears in any recorded transcript. No trace exists → the 3-state model cannot represent the plan-mode pause for this agent.

## driver_capability: n/a

Moot under a frozen route.
caveats: Re-assess if Antigravity persists a plan-pending / approval-pending step to the transcript, or if the adapter gains a plan-mode waiting signal sourced outside the transcript.

sources.note: no plan-mode / ExitPlanMode / waiting emission path; only working/ready
100% status:"DONE"; no PLAN_MODE / approval marker — the pause is never persisted
binary strings: PLAN_MODE_ON / PLAN_MODE_OFF confirm plan mode exists as an agent feature, but it does not surface in the tailed transcript
